info.title: Fabric Service
info.description: This is the spec that defines the API provided by the application to register devices to a fabric, configure fabric parameters, validate all the devices in the fabric and configure switches for IP Fabric with/without overlay

get.description: Get All fabric details configured in the application

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Detail fabric information to retrieve

parameters.name: search
pagination

post.description: Migrate a 3-stage CLOS fabric to 5-stage CLOS fabric.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of migration [3-to-5-stage] (default 3-to-5-stage)

parameters.name: source-fabric
parameters.description: Name of the 3-stage CLOS fabric to be migrated

parameters.name: destination-3-stage-leaf-spine-pod
parameters.description: Name of the 3-stage POD into which the leaf and spine devices (of the 3-stage CLOS fabric) need to be moved during migrate.

parameters.name: destination-3-stage-border-leaf-pod
parameters.description: Name of the 3-stage POD into which the border-leaf devices (of the 3-stage CLOS fabric) need to be moved during migrate.

parameters.name: super-spine-asn-block
parameters.description: ASN block to be used by the super-spine devices of the migrated 5-stage CLOS fabric.

parameters.name: super-spine-peer-group
parameters.description: Peer Group to be used by the spine devices of the migrated 5-stage CLOS fabric.

source_device_id.description: Device ID of the source device

source-device-ip.description: Management IP of the source device

source-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the source device

source-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the source device

source-device-router-id.description: Router ID of the source device

destination_device_id.description: Device ID of the destination device

destination-device-ip.description: Management IP of the destination device

destination-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the destination device

destination-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the destination device

vrf.description: Indicates Virtual Routing and Forwarding instance

neighbor-afi.description: Indicates the AFI of the bgp neighbour

neighbor-safi.description: Indicates SAFI of the bgp neighbour

underlay-session-state.description: Indicates the operational state of the BGP session established between the source and destination devices. Possible values are IDLE, CONN, ACTIV, OPENS, OPENC, ESTAB,ADMDN

error.description: Indicates the reason for bgp session state error

source_device_id.description: Device ID of the source device

source-device-ip.description: Management IP of the source device

source-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the source device

source-vtep-ip.description: VTEP IP of the source device

source-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the source device

destination_device_id.description: Device ID of the destination device

destination-device-ip.description: Management IP of the destination device

destination-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the destination device

destination-vtep-ip.description: VTEP IP of the destination device

destination-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the destination device

vrf.description: Indicates Virtual Routing and Forwarding instance

admin-state.description: Indicates the admin state of the Tunnel established between the source and destination devices. Possible values are up,down

oper-state.description: Indicates the operational state of the Tunnel established between the source and destination devices. Possible values are up,down

error.description: Indicates the reason for tunnel state error

source-device-ip.description: Management device IP’s of the source device

source-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the source device

source-device-router-id.description: Router ID of the source device

source-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the device

source-device-multi-homed.description: Indicates whether the source device is single-homed or multi-homed

destination-device-ip.description: Management device IP’s of the destination device

destination-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the destination device

destination-device-router-id.description: Router ID of the source device

destination-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the device

destination-device-multi-homed.description: Indicates whether the destination device is single-homed or multi-homed

underlay-session-state.description: Indicates the underlay (BGP)session state established between the source and destination router id. Possible values are IDLE, CONN, ACTIV, OPENS, OPENC, ESTAB, ADMDN

neighbor-afi.description: Indicates the underlay neighbor afi state

neighbor-safi.description: Indicates the underlay neighbor safi state

source-device-ip.description: Management device IP’s of the source device

source-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the source device

source-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the device

source-device-multi-homed.description: Indicates whether the source device is single-homed or multi-homed

destination-device-ip.description: Management device IP’s of the destination device

destination-device-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the destination device

destination-device-role.description: CLOS topology role of the device

destination-device-multi-homed.description: Indicates whether the destination device is single-homed or multi-homed

number-of-admin-up-tunnels.description: Total number of admin state up tunnels

number-of-oper-up-tunnels.description: Total number of operational state up tunnels

overlay-source-leaf-ip.description: Management device IP’s of the source leaf device

overlay-source-leaf-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the source leaf device

overlay-destination-leaf-ip.description: Management device IP’s of the destination leaf device

overlay-destination-leaf-hostname.description: Management device hostname of the destination leaf device

no-device-cleanup.description: Indicates whether the fabric configuration needs to be cleaned up from fabric device.

vtep-loopback-id.description: Loopback ID used as VTEP Source IP

pod.description: POD to which the device belongs to

rack.description: Rack to which the device belongs to

app-config-gen-status.description:
Status of fabric deployment. Health is mapped as follows ;
Red - [cfg ready, cfg refreshed],
Black - [cfg error, cfg refresh error],
Green - cfg in-sync

device-provisioning-status.description:
Status of fabric deployment. Health is mapped as follows ;
Red - Not Provisioned,
Black - Provisioning Failed,
Green - Provisioned

message.description: Describing the Warning or Info message

FabricLevelPhysicalTopologyHealth.description: Indicates Fabric level physical topology health and errors

health.description: Health of Fabric level physical topology

DeviceLevelPhysicalTopologyHealth.description: Indicates Device level physical topology health and errors

DeviceLevelUnderlayTopologyHealth.description: Indicates Device level underlay topology health and errors

DeviceLevelOverlayTopologyHealth.description: Indicates Device level overlay topology health and errors

device-ip.description: indicates the ip address of the device

port.description: List of physical ports of the device

port-type.description: Type of the port - icl/non-icl. The icl port is the inter chassis link port connecting the MCT devices and non icl is the port interconnecting leaf to spine, spine to super spine, inter rack links

ss_file_name.description: File including path of the support save capture data

user_name.description: Name of the user who executed the command

parameters.description: Parameters used in the command

user_name.description: Name of the user who executed the command

fabric-device-messages.description: Device details of the fabric in case of Warning or Info Messages

fabric-id.description: Application determined ID of the fabric

fabric-status.description:
Status of fabric deployment. Health of the fabric is mapped as follows
Red - created
Green - configure-success
Black - configure-failed

fabric-physical-topology.description: Physical topology details of the fabric

fabric-underlay-topology.description: Underlay topology details of the fabric

fabric-overlay-topology.description: Overlay topology details of the fabric

fabric-setting-updated.description: list of comma separted settings that were updated

fabric-id.description: Application determined ID of the fabric

code.description: 9001 - Warning with respect to the clearing of the fabric BGP peers

message.description: Describing the Warning or Info message

code.description:
1000 - No Error.
1001 - Validation Error.
1101 - Assignment Error.
1102 - Configuration Error.
1201 - Device Conneciton Error.
1301 - Database Connection Error.
1302 - Database Get Error.
1303 - Database Create Error.
1304 - Database Delete Error.
1305 - Database Update Error.
1306 - Generate UUID Error.
1307 - Database Inconsistent.
1308 - Database Transaction Error.
1309 - Database Copier Error.
1401 - Inventory Service Connection Error.
1402 - Inventory Service Query Error.
1501 - Fabric Service Connection Error.
1502 - Fabric Service Query Error.
1601 - Message Bus Connection Error.
1602 - Message Bus Publish Error.
1603 - Message Bus Event Handle Error.
1701 - API Validation Error.
1702 - API Decode Error.
5001 - Fabric Create Error.
5002 - Fabric Delete Error.
5003 -  Fabric Clone Error.
5004 - Fabric Add Device Error.
5005 - Fabric Configure Error.
5006-  Fabric Clear Debug Error.
5007 - Fabric Generate Debug Config Error.
5008 - Fabric Show Config Error.
5009-  Fabric Get Topology Error.
5010 - Fabric Service Health Error.
5011 -  Fabric Validate Error.
5012 - Fabric Get Error.
5013 - Fabric Discover MCT Error.
5014 -  Fabric Device Operation Error.
5015 - Fabric Unsupported Action Error.
5016 -  Fabric Overlay Gateway Error.
5017 - Fabric Device Missing Error.
5018 - Fabric De Configure Error.
5019 -  Fabric Cannot be updated.
5020 - Fabric Internal Error.
5021 - Fabric generate config Error.
5022 -  Fabric Clear MCT Cluster Error.
5023 - Fabric Delete Device Error.
5024 - Fabric Import Validate Error.
5025 - Fabric DeleteDevice AdminDown Error.
5026 - Fabric DeleteDevice FirmwareDownload Error.
5027 - Fabric Migration Error.

source-node-interface.description: Physical interface of souce node having connection with destination node interface

destination-node-interface.description: Physical interface of destination node having connection with source node interface

fabric_name.description: Indicates the name of the fabric

fabric_type.description: Indicates the type of the fabric clos/non-clos

fabric_stage.description: Indicates the stage of the clos fabric

device_errors.description: Indicates the device level link errors

missing_superspines.description: Indicates whether super-spines are missing in the fabric or not

missing_spines.description: Indicates whether spines are missing in the fabric or not

missing_leafs.description: Indicates whether leafs are missing in the fabric or not

missing_border_leafs.description: Indicates whether border leafs are missing in the fabric or not

racks_with_insufficient_devices.description: Indicates names of racks having less than 2 devices
